loraTrain.title: LoRA Training
loraTrain.optimizationDesc: Reduce unified memory use or speed up training on Apple Silicon. Works with any preset.
loraTrain.qloraHint: Quantizes frozen DiT weights only; LoRA adapters stay full precision.
loraTrain.gradCheckpointHint: Trades compute for lower peak memory (on by default in Quick preset).
loraTrain.compileStepHint: Experimental. Can raise peak memory on large DiTs; prefer off unless you need extra speed.
loraTrain.classPromptPlaceholder: e.g. a photo of a person
loraTrain.loraModuleKeysPlaceholder: e.g. to_q, to_v (empty = all Linear layers)
loraTrain.resumeHint: Continue from a prior run's adapter checkpoint (optimizer state restored when available).
loraTrain.stepBaseDesc: Choose a base diffusion model. Flux.1-dev, Z-Image Base, and Qwen-Image support DreamBooth training.
loraTrain.stepDatasetDesc: Pick or create a dataset in the library, then add 3+ captioned images. The selected base model center-crops and snaps sizes to its VAE grid automatically — no manual resizing.
loraTrain.stepConfigDesc: Pick a training preset and the prompt used for progress previews during training.
loraTrain.stepConfirmDesc: Review your configuration, then submit the job to the global queue.
loraTrain.selectDatasetFirst: Select or create a dataset first
loraTrain.datasetPersistNote: Datasets are persistent. Rename them, delete a whole dataset, or remove individual images.
loraTrain.applyDefaultDone: Default caption applied to all images
loraTrain.resolutionAutoCrop: Auto crop by base model (face-biased for portraits)
loraTrain.datasetKindDesc: Person: face and framing checks. Style: artistic consistency and image quality (VLM prompt follows this).
loraTrain.noDatasets: No datasets yet — create one above
loraTrain.selectOrCreateDataset: Select or create a dataset to continue
loraTrain.dropzoneTitle: Drop images here or click to upload
loraTrain.dropzoneHint: JPG / PNG / WebP supported; you can also import from gallery
loraTrain.defaultPromptHint: e.g. bust portrait, indoor natural light
loraTrain.defaultPromptDesc: Fallback caption / preview prompt for new imports. Use Trigger word for identity; dataset name is not used as identity.
loraTrain.removeImageConfirm: Remove this image from the dataset?
loraTrain.deleteDatasetConfirm: Delete dataset "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

vlmAuditDescTraining.concept: Audit training preview images for likeness
vlmAuditDescTraining.style: Audit training preview images for style match

hint.dataset_healthy: Image count and resolution look good — ready to train.
hint.missing_images: {count} image file(s) missing — remove or re-upload.
hint.broken_images: {count} image(s) cannot be decoded — use JPG/PNG.
hint.suspicious_filenames: {count} suspicious filename(s) (e.g. HEIC disguised as PNG) — re-export recommended.
hint.too_few_images: Only {count} images — aim for at least {recommended} HD portraits.
hint.many_small_600: {count}/{total} images under 600px short edge ({pct}%) — faces may be too small.
hint.many_small_512: {count}/{total} images under 512px — crop may lose facial detail.
hint.low_resolution_median: Median short edge is only {median}px — use higher-res bust shots.
hint.empty_captions: {count}/{total} empty captions — fill in or align with default prompt.
hint.loss_curve_diagnostic_only: Loss only reflects objective fitting; it does not directly judge face likeness. Use verify generation or VLM preview audit.
hint.high_initial_loss: Initial loss {loss} is high — dataset may be hard to fit.
hint.low_loss_improvement: Loss dropped only {pct}% — face quality still needs verify generation.
hint.high_final_loss: Final loss {loss} is high; this is a diagnostic signal, not a likeness score.
hint.extreme_final_loss: Final loss {loss} is very high — progress previews often look like static. Check caption match and dataset health, or train longer with cleaner images.
hint.val_loss_gap: Val loss {val_loss} is well above train {train_loss} — watch overfitting or noisy data.
hint.val_loss_regressed: Val loss rose from best {best_val_loss} to {final_val_loss}; compare an earlier checkpoint.
hint.dataset_health_poor: Linked dataset health is poor — fix images before raising steps/rank.
hint.dataset_health_fair: Linked dataset health is fair — try a quick run before reshooting.
hint.training_healthy: Loss converged well (~{drop_pct}% drop) — use verify generation to check the face.
hint.insufficient_loss_data: Too few loss points ({steps}) to assess training quality reliably.
hint.vlm_no_samples: VLM found no images to analyze.
hint.vlm_low_portrait_score: Portrait training suitability is low (avg {avg}/5 over {count} images).
hint.vlm_training_unsuitable: {count}/{total} images are unsuitable for person LoRA training (score <3).
hint.vlm_heuristic_all_images: 512-crop pixel analysis on all {heuristic_count} images; VLM sampled {vlm_count}.
hint.vlm_tiny_face_in_crop: Pixels: {count} image(s) have faces too small/blurry after 512 crop.
hint.vlm_landscape_framing: Pixels: {count} landscape image(s) — face too small after training crop.
hint.vlm_face_soft_in_crop: Pixels: {count} image(s) lack face sharpness after crop.
hint.vlm_full_body: VLM: {count} full-body/distant shot(s) — face too small at training resolution.
hint.vlm_small_face: VLM: {count} image(s) have faces too small to learn features.
hint.vlm_multiple_people: VLM: {count} image(s) contain multiple people — concept LoRA may confuse.
hint.vlm_text_overlay: VLM: {count} image(s) have large text overlays.
hint.vlm_low_style_score: VLM style suitability is low (avg {avg}/5 over {count} images)
hint.vlm_inconsistent_style: VLM: {count} image(s) inconsistent with dataset style
hint.vlm_progress_style_not_visible: VLM: target style not clear in preview
hint.vlm_progress_wrong_palette: VLM: preview palette does not match training style
hint.vlm_no_progress_images: No progress preview images for VLM audit.
hint.vlm_progress_face_not_visible: VLM: face not clear in preview.
hint.vlm_progress_wrong_subject: VLM: preview subject does not match training target.
hint.vlm_progress_underfit: VLM: preview suggests underfitting — weak likeness.
hint.vlm_progress_overfit: VLM: preview may be overfit or rigid.

loraTrain.progressPromptDesc: Shared DreamBooth caption for training and progress previews (not per-image captions). Must match the dataset default caption exactly. Mismatch hurts likeness; pure static noise usually means very high loss or poor dataset quality.
loraTrain.promptMismatchTitle: Preview prompt differs from dataset caption
loraTrain.promptMismatchBody: Dataset caption: "{dataset}"; preview prompt: "{progress}". Training uses the preview prompt — likeness may suffer.
loraTrain.customGuideBody: Tune on top of quick: lower peak memory than standard, with blocks / Min-SNR and other face-quality knobs exposed.
loraTrain.customGuideTip1: Memory: 512 crop + 3 augmentations + grad checkpointing; full standard preset may OOM even on 128GB.
loraTrain.customGuideTip2: Quality: blocks 12–16, Min-SNR γ=5, 600–800 iters; keep prior loss at 0 (enabling uses extra memory).
loraTrain.customGuideTip3: Previews: progress_steps 28–32 only sharpens progress images, not training peak memory.
loraTrain.customGuideTip4: Caption: preview prompt must match the dataset default caption or faces will not bind.
loraTrain.customRankHint: 8–12 is stable; 16 uses much more memory.
loraTrain.customResolutionHint: Square edge, multiple of 8. 512 is leanest.
loraTrain.customBlocksHint: Z-Image: try 12–16 of 34 blocks; 8 is often too small for faces.
loraTrain.customAugmentHint: Crop jitter variants per image. 3 saves memory; 5 is higher quality.
loraTrain.customGradAccumHint: Gradient accumulation steps. 4 matches standard; does not raise peak memory.
loraTrain.customPriorHint: 0 = off (recommended, saves memory); >0 requires a class prompt.
loraTrain.customClassPromptHint: For prior preservation, e.g. a photo of a person; leave empty when prior weight is 0.
loraTrain.outputNameDesc: Name when registering the trained adapter to your LoRA list.
loraTrain.confirmIntro: Review the settings below, then submit to the global queue. You can browse elsewhere while training runs.

presetDesc.quick: ~300–400 steps — good for validating dataset and captions
presetDesc.standard: Recommended default — balance of quality and time
presetDesc.quality: More steps — best for final output
presetDesc.custom: Tune quick defaults — iterations, crop, rank, etc. (see guide below)

loraTrain.runInBackgroundHint: Training runs in the background queue. You can leave this page — progress updates live.
loraTrain.trainedLorasIntro: LoRAs registered after training, ready for image generation. View training runs on the LoRA training page.
loraTrain.triggerWordDesc: Identity token for concept LoRA. VLM auto-caption writes it into each visible caption; training only validates it, with no hidden injection.
loraTrain.importGalleryHint: Pick images from your library. You can select multiple before confirming.
loraTrain.autoCaptionDesc: VLM writes name + scene captions (concept) or style descriptions.

tools.zImageMergeHint: Weighted blend of two Z-Image-Turbo DiT bundles (MLX). Output lands under models/Image/{name}-fp16/. Models must already be installed locally.
tools.mergeAutoRegister: Register in model list after merge
tools.mergeAutoRegisterHint: Writes to workspace models_registry.json so the merged bundle appears in Create.
tools.mergeFieldsRequired: Model A, Model B, and output name are required.

assetPicker.needImageOrVideo: Please choose an image or video file

image.createDesc: Generate from text alone—no source image. Tune resolution, steps, LoRA, etc. in advanced parameters.
image.retouchDesc: Paint the area to redraw; the model fills it from your prompt.
image.rewriteDesc: Describe edits in natural language; optional mask for precise control.
image.extendDesc: Expand the canvas; the model extends the image beyond the original bounds.
image.upscaleDesc: Pick an upscale-ready model and a source image, set scale/denoise, then submit (no prompt required).

video.upscaleDesc: Pick a SeedVR2 video restoration model and a source video, set scale/denoise/max frames, then submit (no prompt). Uses spatiotemporal latents for better temporal consistency.

studio.workTitlePlaceholder: Name this creation for easier browsing in Works (optional)
studio.logsEmptyHint: Key steps and progress appear here after you start a job
studio.pipelineGraphEmpty: Phase status appears once the task starts
studio.successorHint: We recommend {name} for new work. This model still works.
studio.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
studio.taskIdAiHint: Share this task ID with AI or support to fetch task details and logs (GET /api/tasks/{id}, GET /api/tasks/{id}/logs).
studio.controlnetFluxOnly: Structural guide requires a compatible base model (FLUX.1 or Z-Image-Turbo)
studio.controlnetZImageUnionHint: Install Z-Image-Turbo Fun ControlNet Union; upload a preprocessed control map (Canny, Depth, Pose, HED, …). Canny/Depth can use any photo — edges/depth are extracted at generation time. Optional inpaint source + mask in Advanced when Union is selected.
studio.controlnetNoImg2img: Structural guide cannot combine with reference img2img — clear the reference image
studio.controlnetNotReady: Install the selected ControlNet bundle on the Models page before generating
studio.controlnetMlxOnly: FLUX ControlNet (structural guide / Fill) is MLX-only for now; CUDA support is planned in a unified batch. Use Apple Silicon or wait for the CUDA release.
studio.controlnetBundleHint: Install the matching ControlNet bundle (Models) plus a FLUX.1 base; upload any image — Canny edges are extracted at generation time
studio.controlnetDepthHint: Install flux-depth-controlnet, depth-pro (Tools), and a FLUX.1 base; depth is estimated at generation time (requires PyTorch)
studio.controlnetReduxHint: Install flux-redux and a FLUX.1 base; guide image is encoded via SigLIP+Redux into text context (PyTorch preprocess)
studio.controlnetFillHint: FLUX Fill is for inpainting/outpainting — use retouch/extend from the node toolbar, not text-to-image
studio.controlnetFillEditOnly: FLUX Fill supports retouch/extend edits only, not text-to-image structural guide
studio.controlnetCompanionLoraHint: Companion structural LoRA loads automatically; strength matches the slider above
studio.retouchFillHint: Inpainting requires flux-fill-controlnet; paint the mask (white = repaint). CFG ≈ 30 recommended.
studio.extendFillHint: Outpainting requires flux-fill-controlnet; pick directions and pixels (canvas preview). CFG ≈ 30 recommended.
studio.uploadControlImage:
Upload a control image
(features are extracted automatically)

loraHint.videoStepDistillMoe: This LoRA uses high/low noise shards merged per step; composer values follow registry compose_overrides.

studio.uploadEditImage: Upload or pick an image to edit
studio.editImageEmptyHint: Use Upload, Asset library, or Recent thumbnails at the top of this card
studio.modelNotReadyDesc: Model '{name}' version '{version}' is not ready. Fetch it on the Models page first.
studio.submitOomHint: This version is listed at about {modelGb} GB, near or above the soft cap of ~{refGb} GB (min of system RAM and MLX memory limit in Settings). Generation may still run or may fail with memory errors—you can submit anyway; raise the MLX limit or free RAM if needed.
studio.adapterLoadFailed: Failed to load compatible LoRA / ControlNet list
studio.noOutputAsset: Marked complete but no output asset: {msg}
studio.noOutputAssetHint: Often a mid-run cancel or a run that never registered an asset; successful outputs live under outputs/assets/.
studio.needControlImage: Please upload a control image when using ControlNet
studio.drawMask: Please draw a mask area first
studio.turboModelHint: Want faster previews? Try Z-Image-Turbo (reloads model)

models.pageSubtitle: Downloads, imports, and local model management

avatar.promptPlaceholder: Optional scene or expression, e.g. smiling, soft indoor light…
avatar.needPortrait: Select a portrait reference image first
avatar.needAudio: Select a voice audio track first
avatar.scriptPlaceholder: Enter the script your avatar will speak...
avatar.scriptHint: The app will synthesize speech and generate a lip-sync video (coming soon).
avatar.ttsBackendNotImplemented: TTS backend is not implemented yet.

audio.title: Audio Create
audio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the music you want, e.g. upbeat electronic dance with heavy bass...
audio.lyricsPlaceholder:
[Verse 1]
Write your lyrics here...
[Chorus]
Your chorus...
audio.lyricsHint: Optional. For vocals, add singable lines and turn off Instrumental. Conditioning uses the full lyric block; text beyond ~2048 tokens is truncated at the tail, so later verses may not be sung. Prefer shorter lyrics or multiple runs for long songs.
audio.lyricsRequiredHint: Required. This model needs real lyrics (optional tags like [verse], [chorus]); gray placeholder text is not submitted—type singable lines yourself.
audio.lyricsRequiredAceHint: Required. Add lyrics or use AI Generate Lyrics; 5Hz LM only formats metadata and will not invent lyrics from the prompt.
audio.lyricsRequired: Lyrics are required. Models like DiffRhythm 2 need lyrics; placeholder hint text is not sent.
audio.vocalTypeHint: Appends a caption template to your description (not a guaranteed model knob). Duet/chorus are unstable — try different seeds. Skipped if your prompt already mentions vocals.
audio.durationHint: Registry max {max}s. Longer clips take more time; lyrics are not aligned line-by-line to the timeline — try 30–90s first, then extend.
audio.sampleQualityDesc: More steps = richer detail, slower generation
audio.guidanceDesc: Higher values follow the prompt more closely
audio.temperatureDesc: Higher = more random; lower = more stable
audio.codecStepsDesc: Neural codec ODE steps; more steps can improve quality but run slower
audio.playbackFailed: Playback failed. Try again in a moment.
audio.effectiveLyricsHint: Full lyric text sent to ACE-Step (including 5Hz LM rewrite). Not word-synced to the waveform; sung words may differ.
audio.coverSourceHint: Upload the song or vocal track to reinterpret (ACE-Step cover).
audio.coverPromptPlaceholder: Optional: jazz piano cover, female vocal, slower tempo…
audio.coverPromptHint: Optional caption hint; higher fidelity keeps more of the original performance.
audio.coverFidelityHint: 1.0 = stay closest to the source; lower values allow more creative drift.
audio.coverNeedSource: Please upload a reference audio file
audio.coverDurationHint: Leave default to match reference length
audio.coverLyricsHint: Custom lyrics for the reinterpretation. Leave empty for instrumental.

create.title: AI Image Creation
create.inpaintingDesc: Paint the area to redraw, AI will fill it based on prompt
create.textEditingDesc: Describe how to modify the image in natural language
create.outpaintingDesc: Expand image boundaries, AI will generate extended content
create.img2imgFromGallery: Source image loaded from Works; switched to Edit image.
create.extendNeedDirection: Pick at least one edge to expand
create.rewriteDriveReferenceDesc: Image-guided full redraw (img2img): keeps more of the source; tune strength / fidelity in advanced parameters.
create.rewriteDriveInstructDesc: Instruction-style edits with FLUX Kontext or Qwen Image Edit; follows the prompt more closely—use reference mode or another model if the look drifts.
create.batchSubmitted: Submitted {count} generation task(s) to the global queue
create.composerGenerateHint: No image task in progress — generate now with live progress on this page
create.composerQueueHint: An image task is running — add prompt(s) to the global queue; multiple lines become separate tasks
create.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
create.negativePlaceholder: Describe what you do not want...
create.refImageNeeded: This preset is for img2img, please add a reference image first
create.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
create.lemicaHint: Training-free step cache for Z-Image-Turbo; medium is a good default for drafts.
create.controlInpaintHint: Optional: bind a source image and mask (white = repaint) for Z-Image Union inpaint+control. Use a higher ControlNet strength (~0.75–1.0).
create.inpaintPairRequired: Inpaint source and mask must both be set (gallery assets only).

loraHint.videoStepDistillMoe: This LoRA uses high/low noise shards merged per step; composer values follow registry compose_overrides.

create.presetNeedsEditTab: This preset targets image editing. Switch to Edit image, pick a source image, then load again.
create.turboModelHint: Want faster previews? Try Z-Image-Turbo (reloads model)
create.enhanceTimeout: Local model load is slow — please try again

composerTip.enhance: Expand prompt with local LLM; then replace or append
composerTip.reversePrompt: Reverse a descriptive prompt from the reference image
composerTip.refImage: Add a reference image for img2img or style guidance
composerTip.preset: Insert a saved prompt template snippet
composerTip.enhanceMusicBrief: Polish the music brief (genre, mood, instruments)
composerTip.generateLyrics: Generate structured lyrics from the music description
composerTip.lyricsEmpty: Enter a music description before generating lyrics
composerTip.pickCoverSource: Pick source audio for cover mode
composerTip.reversePromptVideo: Reverse video prompt from the start frame
composerTip.addTailFrame: Add end frame for start–end interpolation
composerTip.llmApplyReplace: Replace current text with the result
composerTip.llmApplyAppend: Append the result to current text

create.reverseNeedAsset: Needs a gallery asset reference (asset:) to reverse

video.title: AI Video Creation
video.editSourceHint: Upload or pick the source video to edit; combine with your prompt for style transfer, local edits, etc.
video.needEditSource: Upload or pick a source video first.
video.presetNeedsEditSource: This preset is for video edit—add a source video first.
video.animateUseEditModeForVideo: Image-to-video accepts start images only. Switch to Video edit and pick a source video.
video.autoSwitchedToEditForV2v: Switched to Video edit to use the full source clip (V2V).
video.editSourceHintFull: Pick a full source video for V2V; add reference images for RV2V.
video.berniniRefHint: Optional: used for R2V or RV2V conditioning.
video.berniniRefHintCreate: References only + prompt → R2V; no references → T2V.
video.berniniRefHintEdit: Source video → V2V; add references → RV2V.
video.berniniBannerT2v: Text-to-video (T2V): enter a prompt to generate.
video.berniniBannerV2v: Video edit (V2V): source video bound; prompt drives the edit.
video.berniniBannerRv2v: Reference + video edit (RV2V): source video and references both apply.
video.berniniBannerAnimate: Image-to-video: start frame conditions the clip. Use Video edit for full source video.
video.longVideoHeroHint: Describe the story arc — AI splits it into shots; then fill keyframes and transitions on the timeline.
video.longVideoSceneWorkshopHint: Establishing-shot refs per location/variant (not the script studio shot list); storyboard Markdown injects a «Set reference» section
video.longVideoSceneRosterEmpty: Set piece entities appear after script parse; you can also add manually
video.longVideoSceneVisionBackfillDone: Vision scene description saved (used in keyframe prompt when set)
video.longVideoSceneVisionUnavailable: Local vision model unavailable. Install LLM/vision and retry.
video.longVideoSceneVisionDescriptionExamplePh: Run Vision backfill from the reference, or edit manually; keyframe prompt prefers this when set
video.longVideoSceneNextStoryboard: Generate keyframes on the storyboard timeline when ready
video.longVideoRelatedTasksEmpty: No generation tasks recorded for this shot yet
video.longVideoParseHistoryProvenanceSummary: T2I: {narrative}/{total} shots merge beat narrative · {face} face_anchor · {close} close-up skip
video.longVideoAnchorLinkHint: This segment inherits the face anchor — no separate keyframe
video.longVideoChapterAnalyzeNoShots: Chapter parse produced no storyboard shots. Check the script and retry.
video.longVideoAnchorHint: Generate a close-up face anchor for identity-locked pre/post I2V.
video.longVideoAnchorMissingWarn: No anchor frame yet; downstream segments may drift on faces.
video.longVideoPostAnchorStartHint: Start frame is locked to the face anchor; edit the anchor node for CU changes.
video.longVideoEndFrameLinkedNote: End frame uses the group face anchor for first+last I2V.
video.longVideoEndVisualPh: End-frame visual (editable when sync is off)
video.longVideoChainModeHintFirstLast: I2V constrained by start and end (anchor) frames.
video.longVideoFlfNeedEndFrame: First+last mode requires an end or anchor frame.
video.longVideoNeedAnchorForSegment: Generate the group face anchor frame first.
video.longVideoBatchSelectGroup: Select a segment inside a beat group first.
video.longVideoResplitBeatConfirm: This will rule-resplit pre/anchor/post for the beat and clear generated frames/clips. Continue?
video.longVideoInsertAnchorFailed: Could not insert anchor (group may already have one).
video.longVideoAnchorAlreadyExists: This beat already has a face anchor.
video.longVideoChainModeHintReferenceR2v: Bernini reference images for identity (cast portraits required).
video.longVideoSegmentTailFrameNoKeyframe: This clip chains from the previous segment tail — no separate keyframe needed
video.longVideoSegmentTailFrameHint: This shot uses the last frame of the previous storyboard video as the I2V start frame. Generate the previous clip first (Clip tab).
video.longVideoParseStrategyLead: This project already has script, cast, or storyboard work. Choose an option:
video.longVideoParseStrategyManualNote: Generates a shot-beat list and text descriptions automatically. Portraits, keyframes, and video clips still require manual generation.
video.longVideoParseStrategyReplaceDesc: Update characters from the new parse (keep existing portraits when possible) and regenerate shot scripts. Clears current shots and final film.
video.longVideoParseStrategyNewDesc: Copy the current brief or chapter into a new project and re-parse. The current project stays unchanged.
video.longVideoScriptPipelineReady: Done · {scenes} shot(s) · {cast} character(s) · {shots} storyboard node(s) — generate portraits in Cast, then frames on the timeline
video.longVideoScriptInputPlaceholder: Paste a story brief, outline, or full script/chapter text
video.longVideoScriptExpandDone: Script expanded — review and edit, then parse
video.longVideoScriptExpandHint: Brief outline — expand recommended before parse
video.longVideoScriptStoryboardReady: Storyboard ready · {shots} shots — generate keyframes on the timeline
video.longVideoScriptParseParamsChapter: Chapter mode: duration is derived from parsed shot count
video.longVideoScriptParseReady: {scenes} shot(s) · {n} character(s) — open Cast for portraits; set pieces live under Set pieces tab
video.longVideoScriptReparseConfirm: Re-parsing updates the shot list and character drafts. Existing portraits are kept when possible, but storyboard timeline work may be cleared. Continue?
video.longVideoScriptNextCast: Generate portrait references; storyboard frames will reuse them for consistency.
video.longVideoScriptStudioHint: Enter a brief or chapter — AI extracts synopsis, shot beats, and character drafts. Set piece entities and refs are managed separately under Set pieces.
video.longVideoScriptSourceBriefDesc: Describe the story arc, mood, and main conflict in a few sentences.
video.longVideoScriptSourceChapterDesc: Paste full chapter text — AI splits it into shootable shot beats (one keyframe per row).
video.longVideoScriptInsightsEmptyHint: Enter text, optionally AI-expand a short brief, then Parse script. Synopsis, shot list, and cast drafts appear here; generate storyboard when ready.
video.longVideoScriptInsightItemScenes: Storyboard shots in order (size / location / visual)
video.longVideoStoryboardSynopsisEmpty: Enter and parse a brief or chapter in the Script tab first
video.longVideoStoryboardPortraitWarning: {n} look(s) still missing portraits — frame consistency may suffer
video.longVideoCastNextStoryboard: After cast portraits are ready, generate storyboard shots and edit frame by frame.
video.longVideoInspectorClipEmpty: No storyboard video after the last frame. Select another shot or add a transition between frames.
video.longVideoCastWorkshopHint: Generate a portrait per look; storyboard T2I injects a cast section with outfit/appearance only—no portrait framing constraints
video.longVideoCastPortraitHint: Portrait refs are for the cast workshop; storyboard Markdown cast section lists outfit only, not portrait prompts
video.longVideoCastVisionBackfillDone: Vision outfit description saved (used in keyframe prompt when set)
video.longVideoCastVisionUnavailable: Local vision model unavailable. Install LLM/vision and retry.
video.longVideoCastVisionDescriptionExamplePh: Run Vision backfill from the portrait, or edit manually; keyframe prompt prefers this when set
video.longVideoConsistencyWarning: Storyboard frame may differ from cast portrait — consider regenerating
video.longVideoGenerationPromptEmpty: Enter a scene and configure cast to see the Markdown prompt sent to the model
video.longVideoGenerationPromptT2iHint: Text-to-image: preview below is the full prompt submitted (including the cast section)
video.longVideoGenerationPromptImg2imgHint: Image-to-image: the composer reference image is also used as the rewrite source in addition to this prompt
video.longVideoGenerationPromptI2vHint: Storyboard video: motion prompt and start-frame chain notes below match the submit body
video.longVideoKeyframeEmptyHint: Import from gallery (top-right) or generate from prompt below
video.longVideoOutputSizeHint: Shared by storyboard frames and storyboard videos; must match storyboard video model presets (I2V start frame).
video.longVideoSegmentPreviewEmpty: No storyboard video yet. Add a motion description and tap Generate storyboard video.
video.longVideoEmptyHint: Add storyboard frames to start; edges between them are storyboard videos
video.longVideoEmptyRailHint: Each frame is one shot. Click the connector to edit I2V motion — AI polish available.
video.longVideoNeedKeyframes: Add at least one storyboard frame first
video.longVideoPolishNeedContext: Enter a transition prompt or adjacent keyframe descriptions first
video.longVideoLocalDraftHint: Local draft · auto-sync after you add content
video.longVideoSegmentDurationHint: Reference duration for new shots; after parse each shot gets its own length (editable on segment edges)
video.longVideoBatchKeyframesPartial: Generated {ok}/{total} keyframes — check prompts or queue for the rest
video.longVideoSaveProjectOk: Project saved (settings, storyboard frames, and storyboard video references)
video.longVideoProjectListEmpty: No saved projects yet. Click Save when ready to add one.
video.longVideoProjectListHint: Open a saved project, edit shots, regenerate storyboard videos, then Merge film again.
video.longVideoProjectDeleteConfirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
video.longVideoProjectTitlePh: Optional label for the project list
video.longVideoSegmentQueued: Storyboard video added to task queue
video.longVideoSegmentAlreadyQueued: This shot's storyboard video is already in the queue
video.longVideoNeedKeyframeForSegment: Generate or import a storyboard frame first
video.longVideoKeyframeModelHint: Text-to-image for each storyboard still. Frame nodes on the rail come from this model—not the video model.
video.longVideoKeyframeModelProjectHint: Follows project settings; change the storyboard image model in the project bar above
video.longVideoSegmentModelHint: Image-to-video between frames. Each storyboard video animates from a start frame (see Chain mode)—not text-to-image.
video.longVideoSegmentChainFirstEdgeHint: The first storyboard video has no prior clip; the left storyboard frame is still used as the I2V start frame.
video.longVideoSegmentChainNeedPrevSegment: Last-frame chain requires the previous storyboard video to exist.
video.longVideoChainModeHintKeyframeOnly: Recommended default: each storyboard video starts from the storyboard frame you set on the rail—best for composition and story beats.
video.longVideoChainModeHintLastFrame: From the second storyboard video onward, use the previous clip’s last frame as the I2V start (ComfyUI-style). Smoother motion, but visuals drift and hard cuts are harder.
video.longVideoOverlapFramesHint: Crossfade length when merging clips—not an I2V setting. 0 = hard cut; 4 frames @ 16 fps ≈ 0.25s is a common default.
video.longVideoEntryHint: Add storyboard frames → generate storyboard videos per shot → merge film
video.longVideoBriefPlaceholder: One paragraph story idea, e.g. a cat exploring a neon city at night…
video.longVideoChapterPlaceholder: Paste novel chapter text, or upload a .txt file…
video.longVideoChapterAnalyzeReady: {n} shot(s) parsed — set portraits in Cast, then Generate storyboard
video.longVideoChapterNeedText: Paste or upload chapter text first
video.longVideoChapterNeedAnalysis: Parse the script first, or ensure at least 2 shots in the list
video.longVideoAnchorDerivedHint: From Plan [Anchor]. Edit characters and looks in the roster panel below.
video.longVideoCastLooksHint: Selected looks are appended after the scene when generating (--- separator).
video.longVideoCastLooksHintShort: Storyboard uses names only; pick the look for this shot (inherits within beat by default)
video.longVideoCastLooksEmpty: No on-screen characters detected. Add below or fix roster names to match the scene.
video.longVideoCastLooksMissingRoster: Mentioned in scene but not in roster:
video.longVideoCastLooksNeedRoster: Add characters in the Cast panel above first; look dropdowns appear here after that.
video.longVideoCastLooksNoMatch: Scene text did not match any character name — showing all characters. Fix names in the roster (e.g. use a short name).
video.longVideoCastRosterHint: Manage outfits per character; storyboard expand fills this automatically.
video.longVideoCastRosterEmpty: No characters yet. Parse a brief or chapter in Script, or add manually.
video.longVideoProjectStyleHint: Filled automatically when parsing the script, or edit manually; used for portraits and storyboard frames
video.longVideoCastLookBodyExamplePh: Blue linen robe, hair pin, bamboo flute…
video.longVideoVisualSceneHint: Scene only; look reference is appended at generate time.
video.longVideoStoryboardReady: Storyboard ready — click nodes for keyframes, edges for transitions
video.longVideoTargetDurationHint: Soft suggestion — smooth motion and story completeness come first; parsed runtime may exceed this
video.longVideoStoryboardExpandHint: Local LLM in 3 rounds: plan beats → expand keyframe/motion prompts → continuity fix
video.longVideoStoryboardOverwriteConfirm: This will replace current shot prompts with a new storyboard. Continue?
video.longVideoNeedStoryboard: Expand storyboard or add shots before this step
video.longVideoInsertKeyframeHint: To insert between two frames, select the storyboard video on the storyboard rail
video.longVideoRemoveKeyframeMin: Keep at least two storyboard frames to form storyboard videos
video.longVideoRemoveKeyframeConfirmFirst: Storyboard frame #{n} and its right storyboard video will be removed. This cannot be undone.
video.longVideoRemoveKeyframeConfirmLast: Storyboard frame #{n} will be removed; the left motion description and any generated storyboard video will be cleared.
video.longVideoRemoveKeyframeConfirmMiddle: Storyboard frame #{n} and its right storyboard video (#{n}→#{to}) will be removed. The left motion becomes #{from}→#{to}; generated storyboard videos will be invalidated and must be regenerated.
video.longVideoGalleryOnly: Long video uses gallery view only
video.animateSourceHint: Upload a source video (first frame is used) or a start image; combine with your prompt for style transfer, local edits, etc.
video.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to generate...
video.promptPlaceholderLong: Brief idea, or use [Opening] / [Segment 1]… after storyboard expand (30s+)
video.storyboardExpandTip: Expand into multi-segment storyboard in this field (needs local LLM)
video.storyboardExpandEmpty: Enter a brief idea first, then expand storyboard
video.longPlanEmpty: Expand storyboard or fill segments manually
video.longVideoModelUnsupported: This model does not support long video; switched to short clip.
video.negativePlaceholder: Describe what you do not want...
video.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
video.presetNeedsStartImage: This preset targets image-to-video; add a start image first
video.runtimeGenWarning: Local runs often take several minutes to 15+ minutes. You can leave this page and watch the header task queue.
video.runtimeModelSize: This weight version is about {size} on disk; leave enough Apple unified memory.
video.needStartImage: Animate requires a start image—upload or pick one first.
video.needAnimateSource: Upload or pick a source video or start image first.
video.presetNeedsAnimateSource: This preset is for image-to-video / video edit—add a source video or start image first.
video.animateVideoNeedsFirstFrameModel: This model only accepts a start image. Pick a video-edit model that supports source video (e.g. Bernini-R).
video.animateVideoClearedForModel: This model does not accept source video—the video reference was cleared.
video.tailFrameHint: Some models support first–last frame; leave empty if unused.
video.upscaleNeedSource: Upload or pick a source video for restoration first.
video.runtimeUpscaleNote: Output frame rate comes only from ffprobe on the source; if probing fails the task errors (no fps fallback). Restoration time grows with frame count and chunk size; trim long clips or lower max frames.

gallery.title: Works
gallery.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
gallery.groupHint: Project groups and ungrouped works appear together; click a group to browse its assets
gallery.lyricsInstrumental: Instrumental track — no lyric text saved.
gallery.lyricsUnavailable: Lyrics were not saved on this asset. Regenerate with the current app version, or check the audio create page after the task finishes.

canvas.title: Infinite Canvas
canvas.controlNetRequired: Select a ControlNet model in the composer first
canvas.pasteImportHint: Paste copied canvas JSON to import a session
canvas.noPromptForNote: No prompt to save for this image
canvas.emptyStep1: Click Import works (bottom-right) to pick from your library
canvas.emptyStep2: Or switch to Gallery at the top and use Add to canvas on hover
canvas.emptyStep3: Select a node and use the floating toolbar (edit / branch / AI note)
canvas.emptyStep4: Press C or tap the bottom compose bar to open the composer — outputs land in the staging zone; press S to snap beside selection
canvas.emptyHint: Import works without leaving canvas view
canvas.importWorksHint: Click to multi-select, double-click to import one. On-canvas items are labeled.
canvas.importWorksEmpty: No works in library yet — generate or upload first
canvas.importNothingNew: All selected works are already on the canvas
canvas.scaleHint: Shift or Alt + scroll scales the selected node
canvas.shortcutEscape: Esc — exit rename/search → close panel → clear selection
canvas.shortcutLayers: L layers · G graph · E edges · I import · R guides · S snap staging · Y lineage · F2 rename
canvas.importDoubleClickHint: Double-click a thumbnail to import one item
canvas.shortcutPan: Space / ⌘/Ctrl + drag to pan · drag empty area to marquee
canvas.workspaceEntered: Canvas workspace: select a node, outputs land in staging (I import · S snap · R guides)
canvas.stagingHint: Generated results land here; drag or snap beside a node
canvas.lineageEdgesShown: Lineage edges shown (parent is on canvas)
canvas.lineageClickHint: Click to focus on canvas · double-click to jump and close sidebar
canvas.lineageDrawerHint: Click to focus on canvas · double-click to jump and close
canvas.lineageJumpHint: Focus this node on the canvas
canvas.lineageJumpMissing: Asset not in the gallery — refresh and try again
canvas.lineageSelectHint: Select an image on the canvas to view its lineage
canvas.sessionGraphEmpty: No nodes on this canvas yet
canvas.branchHint: Staging moved beside selection — ready to generate
canvas.animateBranchHint: Switched to image-to-video with start frame bound — staging ready
canvas.animateVideoBranchHint: Switched to video edit with source video bound — staging ready
canvas.upscaleBranchHint: Switched to video upscale with source bound — staging ready
canvas.coverBranchHint: Switched to Cover with source audio bound — staging ready
canvas.referenceBranchHint: Switched to img2img with reference bound — staging ready
canvas.rewriteBranchHint: Composer opened — rewrite reference ready, staging in place
canvas.controlBranchHint: Structural guide + ControlNet bound — staging ready
canvas.aiDescribeVisionDone: Vision AI note saved from image
canvas.importMediaMismatch: JSON media type does not match current canvas
canvas.sessionCopied: Canvas session JSON copied to clipboard
canvas.controlImageRequired: ControlNet is enabled — pick a structural guide image
canvas.controlImageAssetRequired: Guide image must be a gallery asset

assistant.title: Creative Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Vision reverse-prompt, reference analysis, and batch tasks — use the wand in each composer for quick enhance
assistant.pageSubtitle: Image-to-prompt, reference analysis, and lyrics batches — use the composer wand for one-shot enhance
assistant.composerHint: Use the wand in Image / Video / Audio composers for one-shot enhance. Use the creative assistant for image-to-prompt, reference analysis, and task-card batches.
assistant.llmRequiredHint: Install an LLM from Models (see Settings → General → Default LLM Model).

desc.enhance_image: Expand a short idea into a rich English prompt for text-to-image (InvokeAI-style).
desc.image_to_prompt: Reverse-engineer a generation prompt from a reference image (MindCraft-style).
desc.image_to_prompt_video: Reverse-engineer a video prompt from a keyframe — motion, camera, and temporal mood for image-to-video.
desc.analyze_reference: Visual intelligence: style, palette, subject, and reusable keywords.
desc.enhance_video: Expand camera motion, pacing, and mood for video generation.
desc.generate_lyrics: Write ACE-Step structured lyrics from a music description.
desc.enhance_music_brief: Polish a music brief for ACE-Step genre and mood.

assistant.enhancePlaceholder: e.g. cyberpunk girl, neon rainy night, wet reflections
assistant.videoPlaceholder: e.g. slow dolly in, subject turns to window, cinematic warm light
assistant.musicBriefPlaceholder: e.g. Japanese city pop, night drive, synth and female vocal
assistant.lyricsPlaceholder: e.g. upbeat summer pop about the beach and youth
assistant.analyzePlaceholder: e.g. extract style and palette keywords for the next generation
assistant.presetStyleText: Analyze visual style, medium, and artist mood; list reusable style keywords.
assistant.presetPaletteText: Extract dominant colors, accents, and lighting tones for the next generation.
assistant.presetSubjectText: Describe subject, composition, and framing; suggest one iteration direction.
assistant.presetKeywordsText: List 10–15 English keywords suitable for text-to-image models, comma-separated.
assistant.taskCardsDesc: Manage parallel creative tasks and run them in batch when ready (MindCraft-style).
assistant.taskCardsEmpty: Queue tasks from canvas or manually — batch image-to-prompt, reference analysis, or lyrics

download.title: Model Download
download.name: Model Name
download.quickStartDesc: One-click download recommended commercially usable open-source models (e.g. FLUX.2 Klein 4B)
download.modelPathPlaceholder: Absolute path to model file or folder
download.commercialUseBadgeTip: Registry marks this model as commercially usable; verify the upstream license before production use
download.localQuantNeedFull: Install a full version above (e.g. FP16) first; then you can generate local quantized weights here
download.prequantizedHint: Usually pick full or this, not both
download.loraSearchDesc: Search LoRAs from ModelScope, Hugging Face, or CivitAI; read platform metadata and choose which base model to bind on download
download.loraSearchOpenRepo: Open model page on the hub
download.loraSearchSelectBindBase: Choose which base model to bind for this LoRA
download.loraSearchViewDownloadedHint: Pick a bind base before download; use the same base model in Composer when generating. Downloaded LoRAs appear under Downloaded LoRAs in the sidebar.
download.downloadedLorasHint: LoRAs fetched via Search LoRA. Pick the matching base model in Image Create to use them in the LoRA dropdown.
download.deleteDownloadedLoraMessage: Remove "{name}" from your library and delete weight files?
download.noUserLoras: No user-trained LoRAs yet. Train one from LoRA Train.
download.deleteUserLoraMessage: Remove "{name}" from your library and delete adapter files?
download.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
This will delete {path} directory.
download.batchDownloadStart: Starting batch download of recommended models...
download.importWarn: Please provide model name and path
download.importSuccess: Model "{name}" recorded. Please place model files in the specified path.

settings.title: Settings
settings.generalDesc: Language, theme and output format preferences
settings.performanceDesc: Memory limits, model cache and queue behavior
settings.canvasAutoAddImageDesc: After image generation, add outputs to the active image canvas even in gallery view
settings.canvasAutoAddVideoDesc: After video generation, add outputs to the active video canvas even in gallery view
settings.canvasAutoAddAudioDesc: After audio generation, add outputs to the active audio canvas even in gallery view
settings.workspaceDesc: Storage paths for models, outputs and config
settings.maintenanceDesc: Restore factory defaults and data reset
settings.defaultLlmThinkDesc: When enabled, thinking models reason before answering; streaming shows full output, structured tasks return only the final answer.
settings.modelCacheTtlDesc: Models unused for longer than this will be automatically unloaded to free memory
settings.modelConfigDesc: Configure default parameters for each model
settings.publicConfigDesc: Output settings shared by all models
settings.huggingfaceTokenDesc: Create a Read token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens
settings.loraTriggerWordsHint: Automatically appended to prompt when template is applied
settings.noTemplates: No templates yet, click the button above to add
settings.nsfwDesc: When enabled, LoRA search will also return NSFW models
settings.queueImageFirstDesc: When enabled, image tasks dequeue before video tasks at the same user priority.
settings.presetNamePlaceholder: Enter preset name, e.g. "High Quality Mode"
settings.deletePresetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete template "{name}"?
settings.autoSavePromptsDesc: When enabled, image/video prompt drafts are stored in this browser only.
settings.customWorkspacePlaceholder: Choose or enter an empty directory path
settings.customWorkspaceHint: Config, database, models, and outputs live under the workspace: config/, db/, models/, outputs/.
settings.customWorkspaceRestartHint: Restart the application after changing the workspace.
settings.workspaceSetupIntro: On first launch, pick an empty folder for config, database, models, and outputs. Existing data will be moved from the current location into that folder.
settings.workspaceSetupEmptyHint: The target folder must be empty (missing or containing no files or subfolders).
settings.quickSetupDesc: Recommend image, video, audio, and LLM models for your hardware, then install and initialize in one click.
settings.quickSetupWorkspaceOptional: Workspace is optional: keep the default app data folder, or migrate later under Settings → Workspace.
settings.quickSetupFirstRunHint: On first use, open Settings → Quick Setup to download recommended models. Workspace is optional—you can download and create without configuring it.
settings.quickSetupWarningMemory: Memory may be tight; you can still try installing
settings.quickSetupCompleteDesc: Default models were saved to settings. Open a create view to start generating.
settings.workspaceChangeConfirm: All data from the current workspace ({from}) will be moved to the new empty folder ({to}). This cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.workspaceChangeConfirmFinal: Please confirm again: you must restart the app after migration. Proceed?
settings.configMaintenanceDesc: Restore workspace config files to factory defaults (from default_config/). This cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModelRegistryDesc: Resets only models_registry.json (model list and parameter declarations). Downloaded weights under models/ are not deleted.
settings.restoreModelRegistryConfirm: This overwrites models_registry.json in your workspace with factory defaults. Your registry edits will be lost. Downloaded model files are not removed. Continue?
settings.restorePromptTemplatesDesc: Overwrites presets.json in your workspace with factory defaults; all custom prompt templates will be lost.
settings.restorePromptTemplatesConfirm: This overwrites presets.json in your workspace with factory defaults. All custom templates will be lost. Continue?
settings.restoreRegistryRestartHint: Model registry restored. Restart the application for the model list and declarations to fully apply.
settings.presetMediaScopeHint: Required: template appears on image or video create pages only (not both).
settings.memoryWarningLargeModel: The installed version ({size}) may exceed your memory capacity
settings.memoryInsufficientForAllVersions: Your memory ({memory} GB) is insufficient to run any version of this model
settings.modelNotInstalled: Model not installed. Please go to Models page to download
settings.noParamPresets: No presets yet. Click the button above to save current parameters
settings.setAsDefaultPreset: Set as default preset for this model
settings.noReadyModelForAction: No ready {action} models. Please download from the Models page.
